First Day of School

After a long holiday, the first day of school has arrived. Let's see how you will prepare the girls for this day. First Day of School is a 2D fashion game where you're that stylist who gets the girls ready for the first day of school. They are overly confident in you and your taste.

Play First Day of School Online

Loading game...
About First Day of School

After a long holiday, the first day of school has arrived. Let's see how you will prepare the girls for this day. First Day of School is a 2D fashion game where you're that stylist who gets the girls ready for the first day of school. They are overly confident in you and your taste. This browser game page adds original guidance and context so players can understand the challenge before the embedded game loads.

How to Play
  • Press play to load First Day of School in your browser.
  • Use the controls shown inside the game.
  • Keep practicing to improve your score and progress.
Game Features
Instant browser play Girl game category Free online gameplay No download required
Frequently Asked Questions

Can I play First Day of School for free?

Yes. First Day of School is available as a free browser game on ArcadeNest.

Do I need to install First Day of School?

No installation is required. The game runs inside the browser iframe.
